# BIPM invalid identifiers — must be REJECTED by Pubid::Bipm.
# One per line; blank lines and # comments ignored.

# JCGM is owned by the separate Pubid::Jcgm flavor — BIPM must not parse it.
JCGM 100:2008
JCGM 24th Meeting (2021)

# Unknown committee acronym
XXXX REC 1 (2020)

# Garbage
not an identifier
